name: A Blind Girl Mistook Her Husband for a Rough Man
original_name: 小瞎子认错老公糙汉大叔宠上天
overview: The blind girl Jiang Li accidentally fell in love with her fiancé's uncle for half a year. When her eyesight recovered, she found that everything was wrong and she had recognized the wrong person. But at this time, Xiang Ye had already been obsessed with Jiang Li, and his possessiveness was extremely strong. He would not allow Jiang Li to leave, and made an agreement that she could not leave for a month. When Jiang Li was struggling and in pain, her fiancé returned to China, and the uncle and nephew quarreled. After a month, what choice would Jiang Li make?

trailers.title: 【ENG SUB】His Fake Bride: Mistaken Identity, Forbidden Love, and a Choice Between Two Men.#drama
